series_metadata.series_description: Hearing Aid Dealers and Fitters Licensing Board Application for License and application for Renewal of Trainee Permit contain- ing personal and health status data on the applicants.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain in office until superseded by a new application or the applicant's business enterprise has been closed for 2 years. Then store for 2 additional years in office, then destroy., Paper: Shred
